metadata.description:
# Advanced ChordGun
An expanded chord composition tool for REAPER inspired by Pandabot's ChordGun. 50+ chord types, intelligent next-chord suggestions, trailing chord history, and humanized arpeggiation for sketching out complex harmony fast.
## Features
- 50+ chord types: triads, 6ths, 7ths, 9ths, 11ths, 13ths, altered dominants (7b9, 7#9, 7alt, 7b5b9, 7#5#9), half-diminished, m(maj7), maj7#5, and extended jazz voicings up to 10 notes - Full scrollable chord grid showing every chord type on every scale degree at once, organized by category - Next-chord suggestion engine that lights up the grid in green/yellow/orange based on shared pitch classes and root movement quality - Current chord highlight in gold so you always know where you are - Trailing chord history showing your harmonic path through the grid (toggleable) - Arpeggiate mode with adjustable delay (10-120ms) - Round Robin humanize toggle for randomized per-note timing and velocity - Per-degree key bindings - assign any chord type to each number key (1-7) - 7 modes supported: Ionian, Dorian, Phrygian, Lydian, Mixolydian, Aeolian, Locrian - Live MIDI preview through whatever instrument you have armed - Insert mode drops chords directly into the active MIDI editor at the cursor - Inversion control (-4 to +4) - Dropdowns for root, scale, octave, and velocity - Clickable note buttons for every note in the played chord - All settings persist with the project
## Keyboard Shortcuts
- 1-7: Play assigned chord for that scale degree - 0: Stop all notes - A: Toggle arpeggiate - Up/Down: Scroll grid - Esc: Close
## Source
https://github.com/del-paso/AdvancedChordGun
